question: Before Jesus ascends, what instruction does he give the apostles about staying in a city and waiting for something promised?

choices.A: Stay in Jerusalem and wait for the promised Holy Spirit
choices.B: Go immediately to Rome and wait for Caesar’s approval
choices.C: Return to Galilee and wait for a new prophet
choices.D: Hide in the desert and wait for manna

teaching.title: Waiting for the promise
teaching.body: Acts reports Jesus telling the apostles to remain in Jerusalem and wait for “the promise of the Father,” linked to being baptized with the Holy Spirit and receiving power.
